meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Australian court sets August date for ‘mushroom murderer’ appeal hearing
items.summary: Erin Patterson was found guilty of killing three family members as she served them a lunch laced with poisonous fungi.

items.title: ‘Dangerous colonial occupation’: Israel’s digital West Bank land register
items.summary: A digital register of land ownership in the West Bank is seen as an escalation of Israel's occupation.

items.title: WHO chief visits DRC amidst Ebola crisis
items.summary: WHO chief visits DRC amidst Ebola crisis and urges international community to increase support.

items.title: US-Iran 60-day proposal: What we know
items.summary: US-Iran memorandum of understanding reportedly covers Strait of Hormuz, sanctions relief and enriched uranium limits.

items.title: Kenyan court suspends US Ebola quarantine facility plan
items.summary: The plan to send Ebola-exposed US nationals to Kenya, which has no known cases of the virus, has provoked a backlash.

items.title: How the end of the nuclear file could reshape Iran, and the region
items.summary: A generation of nuclear ambition shaped the Islamic republic. Its end could undo the damage.

items.title: A visual guide to Ethiopia’s ethnic groups and conflict areas
items.summary: Ethiopia has faced near-continuous conflict since 2020, with fighting in Tigray, Oromia and Amhara.

items.title: Gaza parents brave dental dilemma: Costly treatment or food on the table?
items.summary: Many Palestinians in Gaza are forgoing expensive dental treatment, at a detriment to their health.

items.title: South Korea’s SK Hynix enters exclusive $1 trillion club
items.summary: Chipmaker becomes second South Korean company in history to hit milestone.

items.title: NATO states slam Russia after drone crashes in Romania
items.summary: The incident adds to concern that Moscow's war on Ukraine risks spilling over to entangle neighbouring NATO states.

items.title: Netherlands’ World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group, squad
items.summary: The Dutch were unbeaten across their qualifiers and have a outside chance of lifting the trophy for the first time.

items.title: Israel football dispute to ‘heat up’ after protest in Ireland-Qatar match
items.summary: Ireland's football match against Qatar was stalled by pro-Palestinian protests over upcoming games against Israel.

items.title: How Indian PM Modi’s efforts to isolate Pakistan ‘backfired’
items.summary: Pakistan finds itself in a diplomatic sweet spot, wooed by Trump and China. Indian missteps are to blame, say analysts

items.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on launch pad during test
items.summary: A rocket belonging to Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin exploded during a test at the Florida launch pad Thursday night.

items.title: What’s happening on Iran war day 91 as US, Iran near 60-day deal
items.summary: US and Iran near a 60-day MoU aimed at reopening the Hormuz strait with talks slated on nuclear and other differences.

items.title: At least six feared dead after bridge collapses in northern India
items.summary: At least six feared dead after bridge collapses in northern India

items.title: Messi to captain Argentina at World Cup as Scaloni plays down injury fears
items.summary: Lionel Messi's World Cup role was thrown into doubt by injury, but Argentina quell fears by appointing him captain.

items.title: State of trauma: Israel wrestles with mental aftershocks of war
items.summary: Studies and officials report rising PTSD, suicide and social strain in Israel amid sustained conflicts since 2023

items.title: Wembanyama and Spurs force game seven against Thunder in NBA playoffs
items.summary: San Antonio rout Oklahoma City 118-91 to keep alive their hopes of reaching the NBA Finals, where New York Knicks await.

items.title: Senegal deny World Cup travel delay is due to coach dispute
items.summary: Senegal were stripped of the AFCON title after a mid-game boycott of the final and now face turbulent World Cup start.

items.title: Ethiopia to vote on June 1 as Abiy’s ruling party eyes landslide victory
items.summary: Opposition fragmentation and violence in parts of the country could potentially limit voter turnout.

items.title: Mexico backs amendment to annul election results over foreign interference
items.summary: Critics say measure risks undermining electoral process and creating new avenues for contesting results.

items.title: Colombia’s voters will decide between ‘two visions for the country’
items.summary: Al Jazeera’s Teresa Bo reports from Bogota.

items.title: At least three dead after fire destroys Dallas apartment complex
items.summary: A large fire destroyed an apartment complex in Dallas after crews responded to reports of a gas leak.

items.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes on launchpad in Florida
items.summary: The incident is the latest setback for Jeff Bezos’s space venture as it seeks to narrow the gap with Elon Musk’s SpaceX.
